items.why: The mobile decision deck emitted a generic vsfgm:mobile-decision event for non-inline decision cards, but the app shell only listened to the inline choice event. Normal /api/gm-decision responses include options, so this was not a current broken mainline; it was a defensive actionability gap if a future decision prompt has an id/prompt but no option details.
evidence: public/lib/mobileLoop.js renderDecisionCard() emits vsfgm:mobile-decision for non-inline cards
public/app.js syncMobileLoopOverlay() previously only bound vsfgm:mobile-gm-decision-choice
test/session8-endpoints.test.js proves current API decision options are populated

rejected.reason: Still blocked on real received-message proof for football@playfranchisearchitect.com forwarding/copying and current live-origin/routing evidence; no fabricated launch evidence used.

Rejected because /api/gm-decision, checkAndShowGmDecision(), and /api/advance-week gmDecisionChoice already own the source-of-truth path; the right fix was wiring the existing event to the existing modal path.
Rejected as a blocker: scripts/sample-codebase.mjs is absent in this repo, so /audit used targeted rg plus direct file reads. The missing sampler is a tooling note, not product work.

gameLoopReview.finding: The phone loop now has a complete fallback route from pressure card to accessible General Manager modal to consequence submit even when inline option details are unavailable.
